title: goniophlebium bourretii
intro: Goniophlebium bourretii, also known as the Bourret's polypodium, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium bourretii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Goniophlebium bourretii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and health.
